name: SIDBI Loan for Purchase of Equipment for Enterprise's Development (SPEED)
administered_by: Small Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI)
retrieval_text: SIDBI direct term loan dedicated to machinery and equipment purchase: up to Rs 100 lakh for enterprises borrowing from SIDBI for the first time and up to Rs 200 lakh for existing SIDBI borrowers, with equipment sourced from OEMs that have signed an MoU with SIDBI. Applicant SME units must have been operational for more than 3 years with cash profit in the last 2 years. Repayment tenure is 2-5 years including a moratorium of up to 6 months; the purchased equipment is typically hypothecated as primary security.
